mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers discount rates and supports equity multiples, so the S&P 500 should rise over the next month when policy rates are still declining from the prior month. The signal fails when cuts are already fully priced or when rate declines coincide with recessionary labor deterioration.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns are not positive on average after monthly declines in FEDFUNDS, or if the signal shows negative Rank IC over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent baseline signals weakening household income and slower demand, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect is strongest when unemployment rises after a prior period of labor market stability.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not produce negative 20-day returns more often than positive returns, or if the average forward return after the trigger is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in RSAFS and HOUST indicates broad-based final demand and housing-related activity, which should lift equity returns over the next quarter through stronger revenue expectations. The mechanism fails if sales improve while housing collapses, because the joint demand confirmation is absent.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined RSAFS-HOUST signal does not outperform either series alone in predicting 60-day returns, or if positive joint moves are followed by negative SPX returns in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in INDPRO reflects weakening industrial output and tighter real-economy momentum, which should weigh on corporate earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is falsified if industrial production declines without any concurrent market weakness.
failure_condition: Reject if two-month declines in INDPRO are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more often than negative returns, or if the average forward return is not below zero after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is elevated while FEDFUNDS remains below the inflation rate, real policy rates are negative and liquidity conditions stay loose, supporting higher equity prices over the next week. The effect fails once policy rates rise enough to turn real rates positive.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL growth exceeds FEDFUNDS by > 2 pp annualized
failure_condition: Reject if the inflation-minus-policy spread does not predict positive 5-day returns, or if positive returns are absent when the spread is above the trigger for most observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rising PAYEMS series alongside an unchanged or falling UNRATE indicates genuine job creation rather than labor force distress, which should support consumer spending and equity returns over the next month. The signal fails if payroll gains are accompanied by higher unemployment.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases and UNRATE does not rise in the same month
failure_condition: Reject if payroll gains without higher unemployment do not produce positive average 20-day returns, or if the joint condition has no better hit rate than random chance.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO during a monetary tightening cycle signals real activity is weakening faster than policy can cushion, so equities should underperform over the next quarter. The effect is strongest after several months of tightening, not during easing.
failure_condition: Reject if declining INDPRO combined with rising FEDFUNDS does not predict negative 60-day returns, or if the conditional signal turns positive during tightening cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in HOUST after a prior contraction signals stabilization in interest-sensitive demand and a rebound in construction activity, which should lift the S&P 500 over the next quarter through improved growth expectations. The signal fails if housing starts rise while unemployment keeps accelerating.
failure_condition: Reject if housing rebounds above the trigger do not precede positive 60-day returns, or if the effect disappears when UNRATE is rising sharply.
